channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [IBULHSGFIN] Sammaan Capital Approves U.S.$45,000,000 Tender Offer for 7.5% Senior Secured Social Bonds
item.description:
Sammaan Capital Ltd (formerly Indiabulls Housing Finance Limited) has approved a tender offer for up to U.S.$45,000,000 of its U.S.$450,000,000 7.5% Senior Secured Social Bonds due 2030. The Securities Issuance and Investment Committee made this decision in a meeting held on April 7, 2026. The offer is subject to the conditions set forth in the Tender Offer Memorandum, which will be issued to the bondholders.

  • Sammaan Capital approved a tender offer for up to U.S.$45,000,000 of its U.S.$450,000,000 7.5% Senior Secured Social Bonds due 2030.
  • The offer is subject to the conditions set forth in the Tender Offer Memorandum.
  • The Securities Issuance and Investment Committee made this decision in a meeting held on April 7, 2026.
  • The Tender Offer Memorandum will be issued to the bondholders of the Bonds.
  • The Dealer Manager is not related to the Company or the group of the Company in any manner, and the transaction is not a related party transaction.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Indiabulls Housing Finance Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [CUPIDALBV] Cupid Breweries Appoints Mr. Rohit Shetty as Additional Independent Director and Designates Mr. Sachin Rawat as Group Company Secretary
item.description:
Cupid Breweries and Distilleries Ltd has appointed Mr. Rohit Shetty as an Additional Independent Director and Mr. Sachin Rawat as the Group Company Secretary. Mr. Rohit Shetty's appointment is subject to the approval of the shareholders of the Company. Mr. Sachin Rawat's designation is in recognition of his significant contributions, leadership, and commitment towards strengthening the governance, compliance, and financial framework of the Company. The Board of Directors reaffirmed its commitment to act in the best interests of the Company and to remain proactive and responsive in evaluating and pursuing opportunities that are beneficial to the Company.

  • Appointment of Mr. Rohit Shetty as Additional Independent Director
  • Mr. Rohit Shetty's appointment is subject to shareholder approval
  • Designation of Mr. Sachin Rawat as Group Company Secretary
  • Recognition of Mr. Sachin Rawat's contributions, leadership, and commitment
  • Board's commitment to act in the best interests of the Company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [NOVARTIND] Novartis AG Makes No Encumbrance of Equity Shares in Novartis India Ltd as of March 31, 2026
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Novartis AG, the promoter of Novartis India Limited, has declared that it has not made any encumbrance of the company's equity shares as of March 31, 2026, in accordance with the SEBI Regulations. Additionally, Novartis AG has entered into an agreement for the sale and purchase of 1,74,50,680 equity shares, which represents 70.68% of the equity share capital, with WaveRise Investments Limited, ChrysCapital Fund X, and Two Infinity Partners. This agreement was made on February 19, 2026.

  • Novartis AG has not made any encumbrance of Novartis India Limited's equity shares as of March 31, 2026.
  • Novartis AG has agreed to sell 1,74,50,680 equity shares to WaveRise Investments Limited, ChrysCapital Fund X, and Two Infinity Partners.
  • The sale represents 70.68% of the equity share capital of Novartis India Limited.
  • The agreement for the sale and purchase was made on February 19, 2026.
  • Novartis AG is the promoter of Novartis India Limited.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NOVARTIS INDIA LTD. | Category: Deals

item.title: [CUPIDALBV] Cupid Breweries and Distilleries Ltd: Approval of Independent Director Appointment and Designation of Group Company Secretary
item.description:
Cupid Breweries and Distilleries Ltd announced that the Board of Directors has approved the appointment of Mr. Rohit Shetty as an Additional Director in the capacity of Independent Director. Mr. Sachin Rawat, the current Chief Financial Officer, Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, has been designated as the Group Company Secretary. These decisions aim to strengthen the Board composition, corporate governance, and coordination across group entities.

  • Appointment of Mr. Rohit Shetty as an Additional Independent Director of Cupid Breweries and Distilleries Ltd.
  • Designation of Mr. Sachin Rawat as the Group Company Secretary of Cupid Breweries and Distilleries Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [CUPIDALBV] Cupid Breweries Appoints Mr. Rohit Shetty as Additional Independent Director and Designates Group Company Secretary
item.description:
Cupid Breweries and Distilleries Ltd has appointed Mr. Rohit Shetty as an Additional Independent Director and designated Mr. Sachin Rawat as the Group Company Secretary. Mr. Rohit Shetty, a Chartered Accountant with over 15 years of experience, will contribute to the company's financial oversight, governance, and compliance. Mr. Sachin Rawat, currently the Chief Financial Officer, Company Secretary, and Compliance Officer, will further enhance the corporate governance framework and coordination across group entities.

  • Appointment of Mr. Rohit Shetty as Additional Independent Director
  • Designation of Mr. Sachin Rawat as Group Company Secretary
  • Mr. Rohit Shetty's experience in finance, taxation, audit, and advisory
  • Mr. Sachin Rawat's contributions, leadership, and commitment towards strengthening the company's governance and compliance
  • Commitment of the Board to act in the best interests of the company

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Cupid Breweries And Distilleries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [TITAN] Titan Company Ltd Reports 46% YoY Growth in Q4 FY 2025-26 Jewellery Business
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Titan Company Ltd has reported a strong quarter with the Jewellery Business recording a YoY growth of approximately 46% in Q4 FY 2025-26. Secondary sales were higher, growing by around 52% YoY, led by Tanishq and Mia. The average ticket sizes also moved up considerably contributing to the Revenue growth. Within categories, studded grew strongly in early thirties, gold (plain) clocked growth in the mid-thirties and coins nearly tripled in sales. The like-to-like growths across all the jewellery retail formats were close to 48% YoY. The Watches Division reported a YoY growth of 7%, with analog watches growing by 16% YoY and smart watches declining by 53% YoY. The Consumer Businesses registered a growth of approximately 46% YoY. The EyeCare Business grew by 16% YoY and the Emerging Businesses reported mixed results with Fragrances growing by 30% YoY, Women’s Bags growing by 47% YoY and Taneira’s sales declining by 1% YoY.

  • Jewellery Business reports 46% YoY growth in Q4 FY 2025-26
  • Secondary sales grow by 52% YoY, led by Tanishq and Mia
  • Watches Division reports 7% YoY growth, with analog watches growing by 16% YoY
  • Consumer Businesses register 46% YoY growth
  • EyeCare Business grows by 16% YoY, Fragrances by 30% YoY, and Women’s Bags by 47% YoY

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Titan Company Limited | Category: Quarterly Updates

item.title: [SPITZE] Maruti Interior Products Ltd Approves Rights Issue of 4,53,00,000 Shares at ₹10 Each
item.description:
Maruti Interior Products Ltd has approved the allotment of 4,53,00,000 Rights Equity Shares at an issue price of ₹10/- per share including a share premium of NIL. The Rights Issue Committee Meeting was held on April 07, 2026, and the allotment was made in accordance with the Basis of Allotment finalized in consultation with BSE Limited and the Registrar to the Issue. The Paid-up Equity Share Capital of the Company stands modified at ₹60,40,00,000 post the Rights Issue.

  • Maruti Interior Products Ltd approves Rights Issue of 4,53,00,000 shares at ₹10 each with a share premium of NIL.
  • The Rights Issue Committee Meeting was held on April 07, 2026, and the allotment was made in consultation with BSE Limited and the Registrar to the Issue.
  • The Paid-up Equity Share Capital of the Company stands modified at ₹60,40,00,000 post the Rights Issue.
  • The Rights Issue commenced at 08:00 P.M. and concluded at 09:30 P.M on April 07, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Maruti Interior Products Ltd | Category: Rights Issue

item.title: [HDFCLIFE] HDFC Life Insurance Announces Q4 & FY26 Earnings Call for April 16, 2026
item.description:
HDFC Life Insurance Company Limited will host an earnings conference call on April 16, 2026, to discuss the financial performance of the company for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The call will be held at 17:00 hours (IST) and an audio recording will be available on the company's website after the call.

  • HDFC Life Insurance to discuss Q4 & FY26 financial performance
  • Earnings conference call scheduled for April 16, 2026, at 17:00 hours (IST)
  • Audio recording of the conference call will be available on the company's website

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HDFC Life Insurance Company Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SURYODAY] Suryoday Small Finance Bank Appoints Aniket Vishwas Sapre as Chief Products Officer & Head Customer Experience
item.description:
Suryoday Small Finance Bank Ltd. has appointed Mr. Aniket Vishwas Sapre as Chief Products Officer & Head Customer Experience, effective from April 07, 2026. Mr. Sapre has over 20 years of experience in retail banking and product management, having worked with leading institutions such as Fino Payments Bank, AU Small Finance Bank, Axis Bank, YES Bank, and ICICI Bank. He has also had a previous stint with Suryoday Small Finance Bank for approximately 3 years. This appointment is in accordance with Regulation 30 read with Schedule III of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015, SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/CFD/CFD-PoD-1/P/CIR/2023/123 dated July 13, 2023, and SEBI Master Circular No. HO/49/14/14(7)2025-CFD-POD2/I/3762/2026 dated January 30, 2026.

  • Appointment of Mr. Aniket Vishwas Sapre as Chief Products Officer & Head Customer Experience
  • Sapre's extensive experience in retail banking and product management
  • His previous stint with Suryoday Small Finance Bank
  • Compliance with SEBI regulations and circulars

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Suryoday Small Finance Bank Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [BANKBARODA] Bank of Baroda Announces Changes in Senior Management
item.description:
Bank of Baroda has announced changes in its Senior Management Personnel (SMP) and Functional Heads. The changes include appointments, re-appointments, and changes in designations. The new appointees include Mr. DOBHAL SANJEEV, Mr. D DAS, Mr. SHARMA SUNIL KUMAR, Mr. M RAVINDRA RAI, Mr. SINHA SHAILENDRA KUMAR, Mr. KUMAR MADHUR, Mr. SHARMA PRABHAT K, Mr. SARAVANAKUMAR A, Mrs. BANDOPADHAYA SWAPNA, and Mr. GOPALAN V. The appointments are effective from 7th April 2026.

  • Bank of Baroda announces changes in Senior Management Personnel and Functional Heads
  • Includes appointments, re-appointments, and changes in designations
  • New appointees include Mr. DOBHAL SANJEEV, Mr. D DAS, and others
  • Effective from 7th April 2026
  • Bank of Baroda complies with SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BANK OF BARODA | Category: Change in Management
